filing_text:
UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION
Washington, D.C. 20549

FORM 8-K
CURRENT REPORT

Pursuant to Section 13 or 15(d) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934

Date of Report: April 21, 2026

TEST CORP INC.
(Exact name of registrant as specified in its charter)

Item 2.02 Results of Operations and Financial Condition.

On April 21, 2026, Test Corp Inc. issued a press release announcing its financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026.

Revenue: $4.2 billion, up 12% year-over-year
Net Income: $820 million, up 8% year-over-year
EPS (diluted): $1.24, compared to $1.09 in Q1 2025
Operating margin: 19.5%

CEO Comment: 'We delivered strong results this quarter driven by continued growth in our cloud segment and resilient consumer demand.'

The company reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance of $16.5-17.0 billion in revenue.

Item 9.01 Financial Statements and Exhibits.

(d) Exhibits. The following exhibit is furnished herewith:
99.1 Press Release dated April 21, 2026.
